Goldman Sachs traders countered the industry’s underwriting slump with revenue gains that raced past analysts’ estimates.  The trading operation posted a 32% surge in second-quarter revenue that included another banner period for fixed income  https://t.co/8aDTncEg41  https://t.co/vBoBZdDgtc

“Twitter’s Board is holding Musk’s feet to the fire to finish the deal at the agreed upon price,” one analyst said. “Overall this has been a black eye for Musk and a horror movie for Twitter (and its employees) with no winners since the soap opera began.”  https://t.co/8SgiWoVpHG

Twitter CEO Parag Agrawal would navigate a myriad of challenges ahead around employee turnover/morale, advertising headwinds and more, a Wedbush analyst wrote in a note that slashed $TWTR price target to $30 from $43.   https://t.co/2IGCUNAWLd
